name: Css.Reset
comment:
This module helps you to reset base styles. You can use them with elm/html.

  - Eric Meyer’s Reset CSS
  - html5doctor.com Reset Stylesheet
  - Normalize.css
  - ress
  - sanitize.css

@docs ericMeyer, html5Doctor, normalize, ress, sanitize

values.name: ericMeyer
values.comment:
Eric Meyer’s Reset CSS

  - Version: 2.0
  - License: none (public domain)
  - Last Updated: 2011-01-26
  - Author: Eric Meyer
  - <https://meyerweb.com/eric/tools/css/reset/>

values.name: html5Doctor
values.comment:
html5doctor.com Reset Stylesheet

  - Version: 1.6.1
  - License: Free of charge under a CC0 Public Domain Dedication and MIT License
  - Last Updated: 2010-09-17
  - Author: Richard Clark
  - <https://github.com/richclark/HTML5resetCSS>

values.name: normalize
values.comment:
Normalize.css

  - Version: 8.0.1
  - License: MIT
  - Last Updated: 2018-11-05
  - Author: Nicolas Gallagher
  - <https://github.com/necolas/normalize.css/>

values.name: ress
values.comment:
ress

  - Version: 2.0.4
  - License: MIT
  - Last Updated: 2020-01-18
  - Author: Filipe Linhares
  - <https://github.com/filipelinhares/ress>

values.name: sanitize
values.comment:
sanitize.css

  - Version: 10.0.0
  - License: CC0 1.0 Universal
  - Last Updated: 2019-06-04
  - Author: CSS Tools
  - <https://github.com/csstools/sanitize.css>

name: Css.Reset.EricMeyer
comment:
Eric Meyer’s Reset CSS which was converted to [rtfeldman/elm-css](https://package.elm-lang.org/packages/rtfeldman/elm-css/latest/).

@docs ericMeyer
